items.name: Yum-Yum Bits
items.customDescription: Used to feed pets

items.name: Magmatic Helm
items.customDescription:
+10% Chance to ignore Burn and +5% Chance to ignore Poison and Deadly Poison. +1% Chance each to inflict Burn or Deadly Poison on hit.
While there are at least 2,000 Magmatic Scales in your bank, +10% Chance to ignore Burn and +5% Chance to ignore Poison and Deadly Poison. Consumes 1 Magmatic Scale on hit.
While equipped with Magmatic Fangblade, the enemy takes +5% damage from Burn and Deadly Poison.

items.name: Tanzanite Helm
items.customDescription:
+10% Chance to ignore Frostburn and +5% Chance to ignore Poison and Deadly Poison. +1% Chance each to inflict Frostburn or Deadly Poison on hit.
While there are at least 2,000 Tanzanite Scales in your bank, +10% Chance to ignore Frostburn and +5% Chance to ignore Poison and Deadly Poison. Consumes 1 Tanzanite Scale on hit.
While equipped with Wand of the Swamp, the enemy takes +5% damage from Frostburn and Deadly Poison.

items.name: Serpentine Helm
items.customDescription:
+15% Chance to ignore Poison and Deadly Poison. +2% Chance each to inflict Deadly Poison on hit.
While there are at least 2,000 Serpentine Scales in your bank, +15% Chance to ignore Poison and Deadly Poison. Consumes 1 Serpentine Scale on hit.
While equipped with Toxic Quickbow, the enemy takes +10% damage from Deadly Poison.

items.name: Toxic Quickbow
items.customDescription:
+2% Chance to inflict Deadly Poison on hit.
While there are at least 1,000 Serpentine Scales in your bank, this weapon's Ranged Attack and Strength bonuses are doubled. Consumes 1 Serpentine Scale on hit.
While equipped with Serpentine Helm, the enemy takes +10% damage from Poison and Deadly Poison.

items.name: Wand of the Swamp
items.customDescription:
+1% Chance each to inflict Frostburn or Deadly Poison on hit.
While there are at least 1,000 Tanzanite Scales in your bank, this weapon's Magic Attack and Damage bonuses are doubled. Consumes 1 Tanzanite Scale on hit.
While equipped with Tanzanite Helm, the enemy takes +5% damage from Frostburn and Deadly Poison.

items.name: Magmatic Fangblade
items.customDescription:
+1% Chance each to inflict Burn or Deadly Poison on hit.
While there are at least 1,000 Magmatic Scales in your bank, this weapon's Melee Attack and Strength bonuses are doubled. Consumes 1 Magmatic Scale on hit.
While equipped with Magmatic Helm, the enemy takes +5% damage from Burn and Deadly Poison.

items.name: Skeleton_Key
items.customDescription: Wonder what this opens...

items.name: The Spike
items.customDescription: Passive: +15% chance on hit or when hit by an attack to inflict Bleed that deals 100% of the attacker's maximum HP over 10s.

items.name: Aeris Brew I
items.customDescription:
-5% Auto Eat Threshold, and -10% Max Hit and Accuracy
+20% of your Defence level added as Hidden Skill levels, and +15% + 20 Maximum HP

items.name: Aeris Brew II
items.customDescription:
-10% Max Hit, Accuracy, and Auto Eat Threshold
+20% Evasion and +15% Maximum HP

items.name: Aeris Brew III
items.customDescription:
-10% Max Hit, Accuracy, and Auto Eat Threshold
+20% Evasion and +15% Maximum HP

items.name: Aeris Brew IV
items.customDescription:
-10% Max Hit, Accuracy, and Auto Eat Threshold
+20% Evasion and +15% Maximum HP

items.name: Candle
items.customDescription: Grants access to the Big Ol' Mole Hole. One item is consumed per enemy attack.

items.name: Spirit Shield
items.customDescription: Passive: +2 Flat Prayer Point Cost, +0.2% Max Hit per Prayer Point Cost of Active Prayers, and +2% Flat Resistance while at least 1 Prayer is Active

items.name: Blessed Spirit Shield
items.customDescription: Passive: +3 Flat Prayer Point Cost, +0.3% Max Hit per Prayer Point Cost of Active Prayers, and +3% Flat Resistance while at least 1 Prayer is Active

items.name: Spectral Spirit Shield
items.customDescription:
Passive: +4 Flat Prayer Point Cost, +0.4% Max Hit per Prayer Point Cost of Active Prayers, +0.4% of Damage Taken added as Prayer Points, and +4% Flat Resistance while at least 1 Prayer is Active
+30% Chance per Player Attack to apply 1 stack of Dark Energy Sap (-5% Max HP, max 10 stacks, stacks last 1 turn) to the Enemy. While a stack is Active, +30% Chance per Player Attack to Regen instantly for 0.5% Max HP.

items.name: Arcane Spirit Shield
items.customDescription: Passive: +3 Flat Prayer Point Cost, +0.3% Max Hit per Prayer Point Cost of Active Prayers, and +3% Magic Max hit and Flat Resistance while at least 1 Prayer is Active

items.name: Elysian Spirit Shield
items.customDescription:
Passive: +5 Prayer Point Cost, +5% Flat Resistance while at least 1 Prayer is Active, and 1/8 chance to convert Enemy Hit into a Miss
+70% chance when Being Attacked to gain +25% Flat Resistance for 1 turn

items.name: Divine Spirit Shield
items.customDescription: Passive: +2,500% Prayer Point Cost, +25% Flat Resistance while at least 1 Prayer is Active, and 1/6 chance to convert Enemy Hit into a Miss

items.customDescription:
+3% Prayer Point Preservation Chance.
When all of Verac the Defiled's Equipment is worn, the following set bonus becomes active: Your chance to hit an enemy is lucky (Roll twice, take the better result).

+5% Prayer Point Preservation Chance.
When all of Verac the Defiled's Equipment is worn, the following set bonus becomes active: Your chance to hit an enemy is lucky (Roll twice, take the better result).

items.name: Amulet of the Damned
items.customDescription:
When equipped with one of the Barrows Brothers' Equipment sets, gain one of the following effects:
  • Ahrim the Blighted: +5% Magic Max Hit (tripled against Melee).
  • Dharok the Wretched: +5% Reflect Damage.
  • Guthan the Infested: +100 Maximum Hitpoints but -10% Auto Eat Threshold.
  • Karil the Tainted: -0.2s Attack Interval.
  • Torag the Corrupted: +1% Global Evasion for every 1% missing HP.
  • Verac the Defiled: +7% Prayer Preservation Chance.

items.name: Earring of Protection
items.customDescription: +1% Damage Reduction. +5% instead if your attack style is Magic.

items.name: Mastery Token (Combat)
items.customDescription: Obtained by completing Combat Achievements. Used to purchase Combat Mastery Upgrades in the Shop.

items.customDescription: The head of the tyrannical chieftain of Barbarian Village, a sign of true strength to the Barbarians.

items.name: Phoenix Feather
items.customDescription: The most beautiful feather you've ever seen. It represents the cycle of life, death, and rebirth.

items.name: Legendary Sigil of the Phoenix
items.customDescription: So long as you have at least 100 Phoenix Feathers in your Bank, you have a 30% Chance to respawn with full Hitpoints upon reaching 0 Hitpoints. Consumes 1 Phoenix Feather per Fight.

combatEffects.customDescription: +10% Global Accuracy for each time you Miss (stacks up to 5 times).
+15% Global Accuracy for each time you Miss (stacks up to 5 times).
+20% Global Accuracy for each time you Miss (stacks up to 5 times).

items.name: Legendary Sigil of Generosity
items.customDescription:
On a Hit, if you are afflicted by certain negative effects, also give them to the Enemy.
Valid Effects: Burn, Bleed, Deadly Poison, Drowsy, Fear, Freeze, Frostburn, Poison, Sleep, Slow, and Stun.

items.name: Sigil of Water (Lesser)
items.customDescription: On a Critical Hit, give Regen that heals 150% of your maximum hitpoints over 10s (15% max HP per second).

items.name: Sigil of Water (Greater)
items.customDescription: On a Critical Hit, give Regen that heals 150% of your maximum hitpoints over 5s (30% max HP per second).

items.name: Sigil of Water (Superior)
items.customDescription: On a Critical Hit, give Regen that heals 150% of your maximum hitpoints over 2.5s (60% max HP per second).

items.name: Sigil of Doom (Lesser)
items.customDescription: 50% Chance on First Hit to inflict the Enemy with Fear for 2 turns.

items.name: Sigil of Chilling (Lesser)
items.customDescription: +10% chance on hit to apply 20% Slowed for 3 turns

items.name: Sigil of Chilling (Greater)
items.customDescription: +10% chance on hit to apply 25% Slowed for 3 turns, and +1% chance to apply Freeze for 1 turn

items.name: Sigil of Chilling (Superior)
items.customDescription: +10% chance on hit to apply 30% Slowed for 3 turns, and 1% chance to apply Freeze for 2 turn

items.name: Sigil of Blight (Lesser)
items.customDescription: +5% chance on hit to inflict Poison. While Enemy is afflicted by Poison, their Evasion is decreased by 10% on hit (up to 3 stacks).

items.name: Sigil of Blight (Greater)
items.customDescription: +10% chance on hit to inflict Poison. While Enemy is afflicted by Poison, their Evasion is decreased by 10% on hit (up to 3 stacks).

items.name: Sigil of Blight (Superior)
items.customDescription: +15% chance on hit to inflict Poison. While Enemy is afflicted by Poison, their Evasion is decreased by 10% on hit (up to 3 stacks).

+4% Maximum Hit per attack turn (Stacks up to 5 times)

+4% Critical Damage per attack turn (Stacks up to 25 times)
+6% Critical Damage per attack turn (Stacks up to 25 times)

Apply Stun for 1 turn when critically hitting with an attack.
Apply Stun for 2 turns when critically hitting with an attack.

-37.5% Farming Seed Cost and +2% Farming Skill XP and Mastery XP.
-25% Compost Preservation Chance and -7.5% Product when Harvesting.

items.name: Darkblood Grog
items.customDescription:
+50 Maximum Hit Points and +2.5% Bleed Lifesteal.
-50% Hitpoint Regeneration and 10% chance on enemy hit to be inflicted with Bleed that deals 100% of the damage dealt as damage over 20s.

items.name: Darkblood Grog (Mature)
items.customDescription:
+75 Maximum Hit Points and +3% Bleed Lifesteal.
-75% Hitpoint Regeneration and 12.5% chance on enemy hit to be inflicted with Bleed that deals 200% of the damage dealt as damage over 20s.

items.name: Facekicker (Mature)

items.name: Fool's Gold Ale

items.name: Fool's Gold Ale (Mature)
